Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x239F "UFO-239F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "U.F.O.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to default to joystick control: 1. $235A was changed from $74 to $C4 2. $3C77 was changed from $8C to $37
